keyPointsSummary: 'Could have' expresses something that was possible in the past but did not happen
Different from 'should have' — could have = possibility, should have = regret/advice

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं यह पहले कर सकता था।
quickQuiz.answer: I could have done this earlier.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह यह काम आसानी से कर सकता था।
quickQuiz.answer: He could have done this work easily.

quickQuiz.hindi: हम समय पर पहुँच सकते थे।
quickQuiz.answer: We could have arrived on time.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह इस मौके का फायदा ले सकती थी।
quickQuiz.answer: She could have taken this opportunity.

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम यह गलती avoid कर सकते थे।
quickQuiz.answer: You could have avoided this mistake.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं तुम्हारी मदद कर सकता था।

quickQuiz.answer: He could have told the truth.

quickQuiz.hindi: हम इसे बेहतर बना सकते थे।
quickQuiz.answer: We could have made it better.

mustRememberRules: 'Could have' expresses something that was possible in the past but did not happen
Different from 'should have' — could have = possibility, should have = regret/advice
